1.content:
## Kong Konnect Audit Logs
Security audit monitoring across **access**, **authorization**, and **authentication** events streamed from Kong Konnect.

11.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Kong Konnect" and konnect_format == "authorization"
| summarize cnt = count(), by:{granted}
| sort granted desc
11.title: Granted vs Denied

12.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Kong Konnect" and konnect_format == "authorization"
| summarize cnt = count(), by:{name, granted}
| sort cnt desc
| limit 15
12.title: Authorization by Resource

14.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Kong Konnect" and konnect_format == "access"
| summarize cnt = count(), by:{act}
| sort cnt desc
14.title: HTTP Methods

15.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Kong Konnect"
| summarize cnt = count(), by:{src}
| sort cnt desc
| limit 10
15.title: Top Source IPs

16.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Kong Konnect"
| summarize cnt = count(), by:{principal_id}
| sort cnt desc
| limit 10
16.title: Activity by Principal

17.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Kong Konnect"
| fields timestamp, konnect_format, src, name, act, granted
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 100
17.title: Recent Audit Events

2.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Kong Konnect"
| summarize total = count()
2.title: Total Events

3.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Kong Konnect" and konnect_format == "access"
| summarize total = count()
3.title: Access Events

4.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Kong Konnect" and konnect_format == "authorization"
| summarize total = count()
4.title: Authorization Events

5.query:
fetch logs
| filter log.source == "Kong Konnect" and konnect_format == "authentication"
| summarize total = count()
5.title: Authentication Events

6.title: Audit Events Over Time

8.title: Auth Outcomes

9.title: Auth Method Breakdown
